title: Eveready T8 Tube 4ft 36w White 3500k
features: Delivers a consistent 3350 lumens of illumination at 36 watts, providing reliable and balanced light for a wide range of commercial and residential lighting applications.
Emits a 3500K standard white colour temperature, offering a clean, neutral glow that’s well-suited for environments like offices, schools, shops, and public buildings.
Features a G13 cap/base, ensuring straightforward compatibility with existing T8 fittings, making it ideal for quick replacements or upgrades in linear fluorescent fixtures.
Equipped with a triphosphor coating to enhance light quality and colour rendering, helping to produce more natural and vibrant illumination in work or display areas.
Perfect for ceiling-mounted battens, trunking systems, and recessed fittings in professional settings that require efficient and uniform tube lighting.
description: Upgrade your lighting with this Eveready T8 Triphosphor Fluorescent Tube, reliable and efficient lighting for a wide range of general-purpose applications. Delivering 3350 lumens of clean, balanced 3500K white light, this 36W tube is ideal for offices, retail spaces, educational facilities and industrial environments. The G13 cap ensures compatibility with standard T8 fittings, making it a convenient replacement or new installation choice. With its triphosphor coating, this tube provides excellent colour rendering and consistent output, enhancing visibility and comfort across all settings. Designed for practicality and performance, it offers steady, flicker-free operation for professional environments where dependable lighting is essential. Whether you’re retrofitting existing fixtures or completing a new fit-out, this T8 tube provides great coverage, versatility and value.
